## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and resource sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mark shared persona lists, high-opportunity event data, and training videos with the team](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [SEO optimization for Rapyd's pillar pages discussed; team to review and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Competitor comparison articles confirmed as acceptable content; currently hidden from blog but searchable via Google](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Team to conduct AI best practices site audit by next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Resource Sharing and Access

  - [Mark shared persona lists, high-risk event data (GDPR-compliant), and training videos with team](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Files shared with team account; accessibility confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Key training videos: "Value Proposition of Rapyd" and "Card Acquiring"](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Team to notify if access issues arise](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Mark completed SEO exercise on \~20 pillar pages (core products/services)](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Challenge: Pillar pages are conversion-driven, not content-heavy (sub-1200 words)](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Vivek's recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Keep product pages concise; Google recognizes their importance](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
      - [Drive traffic through internal linking from other content](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Team to review Mark's keyword research and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Potential strategy: Create longer-form content using related keywords, linking back to pillar pages](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Competitor Comparison Articles

  - [Rapyd open to creating more "versus" articles](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Existing comparisons: Stripe, Adyen, Checkout.com, Airwallex](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Articles hidden from blog but searchable via Google](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Strategy: Avoid directing site visitors to competitors, but capture search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### UK/EU-Specific Content Sources

  - [Vivek inquired about UK/EU-specific fintech sources due to regulatory differences](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Mark unsure about region-specific sources but confirmed relevance of shared sources to Rapyd's audience](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team to further investigate UK/EU-specific publications](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### AI Best Practices Audit

  - [Mara requested a site audit for AI best practices/citations](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Focus on schema implementation](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Deadline: By next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to send pillar page URLs and keyword research data to team](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Team to review pillar pages and provide SEO recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Vivek to examine existing competitor comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Team to conduct AI best practices site audit by next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Investigate potential UK/EU-specific fintech content sources](https://fathom.video/share/gJh7bPCQSpdPQeaymhNSoMzXoNj4y2wB?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
